content:
Web-public stream created by Boqun Feng. Description:

No description.
Was it intentional that this is the only web public stream?
It’s intentional,and I think maybe we want all “public” stream to be “web public”?

I don't have any problem with that. It is just weird to have a single stream be web public. And it will probably make it seen like there is only a single stream on here when you are logged out, which would likely be confusing for people.
Got it, I will reach out other admins to see if they are OK to make all other public streams "web-public".
